summary: @DAIEvolutionHub: WEB SCRAPING JUST GOT A SERIOUS UPGRADE. PixelRAG doesn't read HTML. It reads the page exactly like you do. 100% open-so
whyItMatters: WEB SCRAPING JUST GOT A SERIOUS UPGRADE. PixelRAG doesn't read HTML. It reads the page exactly like you do. 100% open-source. Instead of parsing websites into plain text, it captures screenshots and lets a vision model retrieve answers directly from the pixels. Why that's a big deal: • HTML parsers silently lose information. • Tables, charts, formulas, and…
